Package org.apache.juneau.http.response

Class Locked

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
java.lang.RuntimeException
org.apache.juneau.http.response.BasicHttpException
org.apache.juneau.http.response.Locked
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, HttpResponseMessage
public class Locked extends BasicHttpException
Represents an HTTP 423 Locked error response.

The resource that is being accessed is locked.

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1
See Also:

    • Locked

      public Locked()
      Constructor with no message.

    • Locked

      public Locked(String msg, Object... args)
      Constructor with a MessageFormat- or String.format-style message.
      Parameters:
      msg - The detail message. May be null. Treated as a format pattern when args is non-empty. Supports both MessageFormat ({0}) and String.format (%s) placeholders.
      args - Optional message arguments.

    • Locked

      public Locked(Throwable cause)
      Constructor with a cause.
      Parameters:
      cause - The cause. May be null.

    • Locked

      public Locked(Throwable cause, String msg, Object... args)
      Constructor with a cause and a MessageFormat- or String.format-style message.
      Parameters:
      cause - The cause. May be null.
      msg - The detail message. May be null. Treated as a format pattern when args is non-empty. Supports both MessageFormat ({0}) and String.format (%s) placeholders.
      args - Optional message arguments.

    • Locked

      public Locked(Locked copyFrom)
      Copy constructor.
      Parameters:
      copyFrom - The instance to copy. Must not be null.
